about.title: Ka Sinqobile Construction
about.subtitle: Molekane wa Hao ea Tshepehang oa Kaho Gauteng
about.heroTitle: Lilemo tse 15+ tsa Botle ba Kaho
about.heroSubtitle: Re aha tšepo, morero o le mong ka nako Gauteng Province kaofela

story.title: Pale ea Rona
story.content: E thehiloe ke Dingwayo Reason Ndlovu, Sinqobile Construction e sebeletse sechaba sa Gauteng lilemo tse fetang 15. Seo se qalileng e le khoebo e nyenyane ea kaho se holile sa ba e 'ngoe ea mabitso a tšepahalang ka ho fetisisa kahong ea matlo le ea khoebo Johannesburg, Pretoria, le libaka tse haufi.

mission.title: Sepheo sa Rona
mission.content: Ho fana ka ditshebeletso tsa kaho tse ikhethang tse fetang tse lebeletsoeng ke bareki ba rona ha re ntse re boloka maemo a phahameng a boleng, polokeho, le botshebi. Re lumela ho aha likamano tse tšoarellang ka puisano e hloekileng le mosebetsi o motle.

items.title: Boleng Pele
items.description: Ha re ke re etse kompromaise ka boleng. Morero o mong le o mong o fumana tlhokomelo ea rona e felletseng ea lintlha le boitlamo ba botle.

items.title: Ho Tšepahala
items.description: Bareki ba rona ba ka tšepa ho rona ho fana ka merero ka nako le ka har'a tekanyetso ea chelete, nako le nako.

items.title: Botšepehi
items.description: Litheko tse hloekileng, puisano e hlakileng, le mekhoa ea khoebo ea boitšoaro e tataisa tsohle tseo re li etsang.

items.title: Polokeho
items.description: Re boloka maemo a phahameng a polokeho ho sireletsa sehlopha sa rona, bareki, le thepa ea bona.

accurateQuote.title: Fumana Tekanyetso e Nepahetseng
accurateQuote.description: Le hoja sebali sa rona se fana ka tekanyetso e tšepahalang, morero o mong le o mong o ikhethile. Bakeng sa litheko tse nepahetseng ka ho fetisisa tse lumellanang le ditlhoko tsa hao tse itseng, re khothaletsa ho kopa tekanyetso e qaqileng. Sehlopha sa rona se tla:
benefits: Etela sebaka sa hao bakeng sa tlhahlobo e nepahetseng
Buisana ka ditlhoko tsa hao tse itseng le likhetho
Fana ka karoloana e qaqileng ea litšenyehelo tsohle

serviceAreas.title: Libaka tsa Tshebeletso

serviceAreas.notListed: Ha o bone sebaka sa hao se ngotsoeng? Ikopanye le rona - re ka kgona ho thusa!

faq.title: Dipotso tse Botsoa Hangata
faq.subtitle: Dipotso tse Tloaelehileng ka Ditshebeletso tsa Rona tsa Kaho
faq.heroTitle: O na le Dipotso? Re na le Dikarabo
faq.heroSubtitle: Fumana dikarabo tsa dipotso tse tloaelehileng ka ditshebeletso tsa rona

items.question: Na le fana ka litheko tsa mahala?
items.answer: E, re fana ka litheko tsa mahala, tse se nang boitlamo bakeng sa ditshebeletso tsohle tsa rona. Ikopanye le rona feela ka lintlha tsa morero oa hao 'me re tla hlophisa nako e loketseng ea ho hlahloba ditlhoko tsa hao.

items.question: Ke libaka life tseo le li sebeletsa?
items.answer: Re sebeletsa libaka tsohle Gauteng Province kaofela, ho kenyelletsa Johannesburg, Pretoria, East Rand, West Rand, le libaka tse haufi. Ikopanye le rona ho netefatsa phihlello ea sebaka sa hao se itseng.

items.question: Na le na le laesense 'me le sireletsehile?
items.answer: E, Sinqobile Construction e na le laesense e felletseng 'me e sireletsehile. Re jara inshorense e felletseng ea boikarabelo ho sireletsa bareki ba rona le sehlopha sa rona nakong ea merero eohle.

items.question: Merero e nka nako e kae hangata?
items.answer: Linako tsa merero li fapana ho latela boholo le bothata. Litokiso tse nyenyane li ka nka matsatsi a 1-2, ha merero e meholo ea kaho e ka nka libeke tse 'maloa. Re fana ka linako tse qaqileng ka tekanyetso e 'ngoe le e 'ngoe.

items.question: Ke mekhoa efe ea tefo eo le e amohelang?
items.answer: Re amohela chelete, liphetisetso tsa banka, le litefo tsa likarete. Bakeng sa merero e meholo, hangata re hloka depositi ho qala mosebetsi, 'me tekanyo e setseng e lokela ho lefshoa ha mosebetsi o phethoa.

items.question: Na le fana ka ditiisetso mosebetsing oa lona?
items.answer: E, re ema ka morao ho mosebetsi oa rona ka ditiisetso tse felletseng. Linako tsa tiiso li fapana ka mofuta oa tshebeletso, 'me re tla fana ka lintlha tse felletseng tsa tiiso ka tekanyetso ea hao.

items.question: Na le fana ka lisebelisoa kapa ke tlameha ho li reka?
items.answer: Re ka fana ka lisebelisoa tsohle e le karolo ea tshebeletso ea rona, kapa re sebetse ka lisebelisoa tseo o li rekileng. Re tla fa keletso ea mokhoa o motle o ipapisitseng le morero le tekanyetso ea hao.

items.question: Na le ka sebetsa mabenkeleng kapa mantsiboya?
items.answer: E, re fana ka ho hlophisa ha nako e feto-fetohang ho kenyelletsa mosebetsi oa mabenkeleng le mantsiboya bakeng sa merero ea tšohanyetso kapa boiketlo ba moreki. Litšenyehelo tse eketsehileng li ka sebetsa bakeng sa mosebetsi oa ka mor'a lihora.

items.question: Na le sebetsana le litokiso tsa tšohanyetso?
items.answer: E, re fana ka ditshebeletso tsa ho lokisa tsa tšohanyetso tsa 24/7 bakeng sa mathata a tšohanyetso joalo ka liphaephe tse phatloang, mathata a motlakase, kapa tšenyo ea sebopeho. Re letsetse hang-hang bakeng sa thuso ea tšohanyetso.

stillHaveQuestions.title: O sa na le Dipotso?
stillHaveQuestions.subtitle: Se ke oa tsilatsila ho fihlela - re teng ho thusa!

blog.title: Lintlha tsa Kaho & Malebela
blog.subtitle: Keletso ea setsebi, litataiso, le lintlha tsa indasteri ho tsoa ho Sinqobile Construction. Ithute ka litšenyehelo tsa kaho, mehopolo ea ho nchafatsa, melao ea kaho, le tse ling.
blog.noResults: Ha ho lingodiloe tse fumanoeng tse lumellanang le litekanyetso tsa hao. Leka ho lokisa phuputso ea hao kapa li-filter.
blog.ctaTitle: O Hloka Keletso ea Setsebi ea Kaho?
blog.ctaSubtitle: Sehlopha sa rona sa Sinqobile Construction se teng ho thusa ka morero oa hao oa kaho. Fumana puisano ea mahala le tekanyetso kajeno.

about.title: Ka Dingwayo Reason Ndlovu
about.description: Ka boiphihlelo ba lilemo tse fetang 15 indastering ea kaho, Dingwayo Reason Ndlovu o hahile lebitso la mosebetsi o motle le tshebeletso e tshepehang Gauteng kaofela.
about.experience: Ho tloha ho lokiseng matlo a manyenyane ho ea ho merero e meholo ea kaho, re fana ka liphetho tse ikhethang tse etsang hore nako e fete.

whyChooseUs.title: Hobaneng o Khethe Sinqobile Construction bakeng sa Morero oa Hao oa Kaho?
whyChooseUs.subtitle: Ditshebeletso tsa kaho tsa setsebi Gauteng tse nang le boitsebiso bo netefaditsoeng kahong, ho nchafatsa, ho roala, ho penta, ho beha majwe, ho beha lithaele, ditshebeletso tsa metsi, le tse ling. Mona ke hobaneng baahi ba thepa Johannesburg, Pretoria, le Sandton ba tšepa Sinqobile Construction:

experience.title: Boiphihlelo ba Lilemo tse 15+
experience.description: Ho feta lilemo tse 15 tsa boiphihlelo ba kaho ea setsebi bo sebeletsa Gauteng. Re phethile merero e 500+ e atlehileng Johannesburg, Pretoria, Sandton, le libaka tse haufi.

licensed.title: E na le Laesense e Felletseng 'me e Sireletsehile
licensed.description: E ngodisitsoeng ho NHBRC 'me e sireletsehile ka botlalo ka phihlello e felletseng ea boikarabelo. Thepa ea hao le tšebeliso ea hao ea chelete li sireletsehile ka morero o mong le o mong oo re o etsang.

quality.title: Mosebetsi oa Boleng o Tiisitsoe
quality.description: Re ema ka morao ho mosebetsi oa rona ka ditiisetso tse felletseng. Morero o mong le o mong o fihlela maemo a phahameng a boleng, ho tloha ho roala le ho penta ho ea ho ho nchafatsa matlo ka botlalo.

team.title: Sehlopha sa Litsebi tse Tšoanelang
team.description: Litsebi tsa rona tsa kaho tse nang le setifikeiti li ikhethile kahong, ho beha lithaele, ho beha majwe, ditshebeletso tsa metsi, marulelo, le ho thibela metsi. Litsebi tse nang le boitsebiso tse ikemiselitseng ho ba ba holimo.

onTime.title: Ho Fana ka Morero ka Nako
onTime.description: Re hlompha nako ea hao le tekanyetso ea hao ea chelete. Merero e phethoa ka nako ka litheko tse hlakileng 'me ntle le litšenyehelo tse patiloeng. Tefiso ea R400 ea ho letsetsa bakeng sa lipuisano le litheko.

allAreas.title: Re Sebeletsa Libaka Tsohle tsa Gauteng
allAreas.description: Ho tloha Johannesburg CBD ho ea Sandton, Pretoria ho ea Centurion, Midrand ho ea Fourways - re fana ka ditshebeletso tsa kaho tsa setsebi libakeng tsohle tsa Gauteng.

rating.title: Tekanyetso ea Bareki ea 4.9★
rating.description: E tekanyetsitsoe linaleli tse 4.9 ke bareki ba kgotsofetseng. Bala ditlhahlobo tsa rona tsa Google ho bona hobaneng baahi ba matlo le likhoebo ba tšepa Sinqobile Construction bakeng sa ditlhoko tsa bona tsa kaho.

emergency.title: Ditshebeletso tsa Tšohanyetso tsa 24/7
emergency.description: Ditshebeletso tsa kaho tsa tšohanyetso li fumaneha bakeng sa litokiso tse potlakileng ho kenyelletsa liphaephe tse phatlohetsoeng, mathata a motlakase, ho lutla ha marulelo, le tšenyo ea sebopeho. Letsetsa +27 82 868 8396 kapa +27 81 569 2985 nako efe kapa efe.

whyChooseUs.comprehensiveTitle: Ditshebeletso tse Felletseng tsa Kaho Gauteng Kaofela

comprehensiveContent.para1: Sinqobile Construction ke molekane oa hao oa kaho ea tšepahalang o sebeletsa libaka tsohle tsa Gauteng Province. Ebang o hloka baahi ba kaho Johannesburg, litsebi tsa ho nchafatsa Sandton, kapa ditshebeletso tsa kaho Pretoria, sehlopha sa rona se nang le boiphihlelo se fana ka liphetho tse ikhethang.
comprehensiveContent.para2: Ditshebeletso tsa rona tse felletseng di kenyelletsa kaho ea matlo, kaho ea khoebo, ho nchafatsa matlo, ho roala le ho penta, ho beha majwe le ditsela tsa dikoloi, ditshebeletso tsa lithaele, ho kenya metsi le ho lokisa, marulelo le ho thibela metsi, le tlhokomelo e tloaelehileng.
comprehensiveContent.para3: Ka boiphihlelo ba kaho ba lilemo tse 15+ le merero e 500+ e phethiloeng, re hahile lebitso la mosebetsi oa boleng, tshebeletso e tšepahalang, le litheko tse tlholisanang. Tekanyetso ea rona ea bareki ea linaleli tse 4.9 e bontša boitlamo ba rona ho kgotsofalo ea bareki.
comprehensiveContent.para4: Re sebeletsa bareki ba matlo le ba khoebo Johannesburg, Sandton, Pretoria, Centurion, Midrand, Randburg, Fourways, Roodepoort, le libaka tsohle tse haufi tsa Gauteng. Tsebo ea rona ea lehae e netefatsa hore re utloisisa ditlhoko tse ikhethang tsa kaho tsa sebaka se seng le se seng.
comprehensiveContent.para5: Litheko tsa mahala li fumaneha ka tefiso e hlakileng ea R400 ea ho letsetsa bakeng sa lipuisano. Ikopanye le rona ho +27 82 868 8396 kapa +27 81 569 2985 ho buisana ka morero oa hao oa kaho. Re na le laesense e felletseng, re ngodisitsoeng ho NHBRC, 'me re sireletsehile ka botlalo bakeng sa kgotso ea hao ea kelello.

testimonials.title: Seo Bareki ba Rona ba se Buang
testimonials.subtitle: Se ke wa nka lentswe la rona feela

items.text: Meshack le sehlopha sa hae ba entse mosebetsi o motle haholo ho nchafatsa kichineng ea rona. Ba setsebi, ba tshepehang, 'me ba hlokomela lintlha.
items.name: Sarah Johnson

items.text: Mosebetsi o makatsang oa ho beha majwe tseleng ea rona ea koloi. O phethiloe ka nako 'me ka har'a tekanyetso ea chelete. Ho kgothaletswa haholo!
items.name: David Smith

items.text: Mosebetsi oa ho roala o ne o phethahetseng. O hloekile, oa setsebi, 'me boleng ba ho qeta bo fetile seo re neng re se lebella.
items.name: Maria Gonzalez
